name: Dashboard Surface Health Center Agent
purpose: Summarize whether existing local dashboard surfaces are wired, documented, guarded, and visibly bounded.
safetyNotes: Inspects only existing route metadata, dashboard summary data, and dashboard HTML strings.
Does not mutate routes, reports, docs, manifests, settings, or connector state.
Does not execute commands, call external services, upload, share, publish, or certify readiness.
